name: ExtensionConceptMap_Group_Element_Target_DependsOn_Value
title: R5: Value of the referenced data element additional types
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ConceptMap.group.element.target.dependsOn.value[x]` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ConceptMap.group.element.target.dependsOn.value[x]` 0..1 `boolean, code, Coding, Quantity, string`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ConceptMap.group.element.target.dependsOn.value[x]` 0..1 `boolean, code, Coding, Quantity, string`
*  R4B: `ConceptMap.group.element.target.dependsOn.value` 1..1 `string`
*  R4: `ConceptMap.group.element.target.dependsOn.value` 1..1 `string`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ConceptMap.group.element.target.dependsOn.value[x]` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ConceptMap.group.element.target.dependsOn.value` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `ConceptMap.group.element.target.dependsOn.value[x]` do not cover the following types: boolean, Coding, Quantity.

element.short: R5: Value of the referenced data element additional types
element.comment:
Element `ConceptMap.group.element.target.dependsOn.value[x]` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ConceptMap.group.element.target.dependsOn.value` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `ConceptMap.group.element.target.dependsOn.value[x]` do not cover the following types: boolean, Coding, Quantity.
If the data type is a code, then the code system is .group.source for .dependsOn.valueCode and .group.target for .product.valueCode.

element.short: Value of the referenced data element
element.definition: Data element value that the map depends on / produces.
element.comment: If the data type is a code, then the code system is .group.source for .dependsOn.valueCode and .group.target for .product.valueCode.
